message.content:
{
  "decision": "Use BenchmarkContext as immutable config container with Repository, Model, and Constraints; score = mean of finite values (0 if none)",
  "constraint": "One heavy model server at a time; fixed model paths; Docker-isolated; watchdog timeouts enforce safety",
  "risk": "Model server overload or timeout if constraints not respected; non-finite scores silently defaulted to 0",
  "next_steps": [
    "Implement Docker runner to serialize model loads per BenchmarkContext",
    "Log all inputs/outputs with reproducible IDs",
    "Validate Constraints syntax before execution",
    "Add metric collection for score distribution and timeout rates"
  ]
}
